conference.name: 41st Meeting of the European Economic Association and 77th European Meeting of the Econometric Society

extras.description: Annual congress of the European Economic Association and European Meeting of the Econometric Society.

keynote_speakers: Melissa S. Kearney (Notre Dame) - Marshall Lecture
Imran Rasul (UCL & IFS) - EEA Presidential Address

scrape_metadata.notes: Full 3-level scrape: 216 sessions, 778 participants with institutions from speaker pages.
